summary: Live-applied ADR 0282 from the latest rebased origin/main lineage by converging Mailpit on docker-runtime-lv3 as a private-only SMTP and HTTP mail interceptor, wiring the runtime contract for non-production SMTP consumers, reconciling the generated docs surfaces touched by the service catalogs, and verifying message capture both locally and from monitoring-lv3 over the guest network.

verification.check: Targeted Mailpit and SMTP-contract regression coverage
verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest python -m pytest -q tests/test_mailpit_runtime_role.py tests/test_mailpit_playbook.py tests/test_keycloak_runtime_role.py tests/test_mail_platform_verify_playbook.py` returned `22 passed in 0.83s` on the rebased head after the role topology fix and mail-platform syntax-check repair were replayed onto the latest origin/main lineage.

verification.check: Mailpit syntax, scope-runner, and repository validation paths
verification.observed: `make syntax-check-mailpit`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/ansible_scope_runner.py validate`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/ansible_scope_runner.py run --inventory inventory/hosts.yml --run-id ws0282syntax5 --playbook playbooks/services/mailpit.yml --env production -- --private-key .local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 -e proxmox_guest_ssh_connection_mode=proxmox_host_jump --syntax-check`, `ansible-playbook -i inventory/hosts.yml playbooks/mail-platform-verify.yml --private-key .local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 -e proxmox_guest_ssh_connection_mode=proxmox_host_jump -e env=staging --syntax-check`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces agent-standards health-probes`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, `make check-canonical-truth`, `make validate-generated-slo`, `make validate-generated-docs`, and `make validate-generated-portals` all passed on the synchronized worktree after the generated diagram surfaces were refreshed.

`ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=mailpit env=production` succeeded from commit `bd15ecd2965e4e6213f0608f5bf8d9dae9ee1594` with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=96 changed=5 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=16 rescued=0 ignored=0`.

verification.check: Independent Mailpit API and guest-network SMTP verification
verification.observed: A refreshed Ansible ad hoc probe on `docker-runtime-lv3` returned Mailpit info with `Version=v1.29.5` and `SMTPAccepted=2`, then a second Ansible ad hoc verification from `monitoring-lv3` cleared `http://10.10.10.20:8025/api/v1/messages`, sent SMTP to `10.10.10.20:1025`, and read back exactly one captured message with subject `LV3 Mailpit external verification`.

notes: This receipt records branch-local live-apply proof on top of the latest origin/main lineage before the final mainline release surfaces are updated.

The first governed replay failed before the Mailpit runtime converged because the role default resolved service topology from the wrong variable scope; commit `ae60394c67d15486f7d64a90b327bac4ad0e7174` corrected that contract and the second replay succeeded.
The rebased replay and receipt now supersede the earlier pre-rebase branch-local proof so the evidence points at a surviving commit in the synchronized worktree lineage.

VERSION, changelog release surfaces, versions/stack.yaml platform_version, build/platform-manifest.json, and the integrated README status summary remain to be finalized only during the exact mainline integration step.

correction_loop.repair_action: Resolve mailpit_service_topology from hostvars['proxmox-host'].platform_service_topology instead of the undefined play-local platform_service_topology mapping.
correction_loop.verification: Reran the targeted pytest and syntax checks, then reran the governed Mailpit live apply successfully and confirmed a second SMTP capture from monitoring-lv3.
